name: fluid-message-composer
title: Message Composer
author: Micka Touillaud
description: Composes, attaches, queues, reorders, recalls, stops, and sends messages through controlled application state.

files.content:
"use client";

import { createContext, useContext, useMemo, type ComponentType, type ReactNode } from "react";

import {
  ChevronRight,
  ChevronDown,
  X,
  Copy,
  Menu,
  Dot,
  Monitor,
  Sun,
  Moon,
  RectangleHorizontal,
  Circle,
  SquareLibrary,
  Clock,
  Star,
  Settings,
  Plus,
  ArrowLeft,
  ArrowRight,
  ArrowUp,
  Search,
  Loader,
  Users,
  Lock,
  Mail,
  Bell,
  Shield,
  Palette,
  Lightbulb,
  Rocket,
  Heart,
  Paintbrush,
  Brain,
  Globe,
  User,
  ImageIcon,
  Link,
  Check,
  RotateCcw,
  Play,
  Pause,
  Pipette,
  Home,
  MessageCircle,
  Inbox,
  Pencil,
  SkipForward,
  CornerDownRight,
} from "lucide-react";

export interface IconComponentProps {
  size?: number;
  strokeWidth?: number;
  className?: string;
}

export type IconComponent = ComponentType<IconComponentProps>;

export type IconName =
  | "chevron-right" | "chevron-down" | "x" | "copy" | "menu" | "dot"
  | "monitor" | "sun" | "moon" | "rectangle-horizontal" | "circle"
  | "square-library" | "clock" | "star" | "settings"
  | "plus" | "arrow-left" | "arrow-right" | "arrow-up" | "search" | "loader"
  | "users" | "lock" | "mail" | "bell" | "shield" | "palette"
  | "lightbulb" | "rocket" | "heart" | "paintbrush" | "brain"
  | "globe" | "user"
  | "image" | "link" | "check" | "rotate-ccw"
  | "play" | "pause" | "pipette"
  | "home" | "message-circle" | "inbox"
  | "pencil" | "skip-forward" | "corner-down-right";

export const defaultIcons: Record<IconName, IconComponent> = {
  "chevron-right": ChevronRight,
  "chevron-down": ChevronDown,
  "pipette": Pipette,
  "x": X,
  "copy": Copy,
  "menu": Menu,
  "dot": Dot,
  "monitor": Monitor,
  "sun": Sun,
  "moon": Moon,
  "rectangle-horizontal": RectangleHorizontal,
  "circle": Circle,
  "square-library": SquareLibrary,
  "clock": Clock,
  "star": Star,
  "settings": Settings,
  "plus": Plus,
  "arrow-left": ArrowLeft,
  "arrow-right": ArrowRight,
  "arrow-up": ArrowUp,
  "search": Search,
  "loader": Loader,
  "users": Users,
  "lock": Lock,
  "mail": Mail,
  "bell": Bell,
  "shield": Shield,
  "palette": Palette,
  "lightbulb": Lightbulb,
  "rocket": Rocket,
  "heart": Heart,
  "paintbrush": Paintbrush,
  "brain": Brain,
  "globe": Globe,
  "user": User,
  "image": ImageIcon,
  "link": Link,
  "check": Check,
  "rotate-ccw": RotateCcw,
  "play": Play,
  "pause": Pause,
  "home": Home,
  "message-circle": MessageCircle,
  "inbox": Inbox,
  "pencil": Pencil,
  "skip-forward": SkipForward,
  "corner-down-right": CornerDownRight,
};

const IconContext = createContext<Record<IconName, IconComponent> | null>(null);

/**
 * Returns a single icon component for the given name.
 * Falls back to the default (Lucide) set if no provider is present.
 */
function useIcon(name: IconName): IconComponent {
  const icons = useContext(IconContext);
  return (icons ?? defaultIcons)[name];
}

/**
 * Returns the full icon map.
 * Falls back to the default (Lucide) set if no provider is present.
 */
function useIcons(): Record<IconName, IconComponent> {
  const icons = useContext(IconContext);
  return icons ?? defaultIcons;
}

/**
 * Swap some or all icons for components from another library.
 * Names left out of `icons` keep their default (Lucide) component.
 */
function IconProvider({
  children,
  icons,
}: {
  children: ReactNode;
  icons?: Partial<Record<IconName, IconComponent>>;
}) {
  const value = useMemo(() => ({ ...defaultIcons, ...icons }), [icons]);
  return <IconContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</IconContext.Provider>;
}

export { IconProvider, useIcon, useIcons };

dark.shadow-5: inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.04), inset 0 0 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.04), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shadow-color), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--shadow-color)
dark.shadow-6: inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.04), inset 0 0 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--shadow-color), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--shadow-color)
dark.shadow-7: inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06), inset 0 0 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--shadow-color), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--shadow-color)
dark.shadow-8: inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06), inset 0 0 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--shadow-color), 0 96px 96px -48px var(--shadow-color)

changes: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.
Wrapped the composer in MotionConfig with the user's reduced-motion preference.
Changed the attachment remove control from a physical right offset to the logical inline end.
Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.
Resolved the PDF worker from the installed pdfjs-dist package instead of a remote CDN URL.
Updated the PDF fallback comment to describe local worker loading instead of CDN failure.
Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.
Disabled scale, stroke, and spinner motion when the user requests reduced motion.
Namespaced the two spinner animation names to avoid collisions in consumer stylesheets.
Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.

license.scope: registry/default/input-message.tsx, registry/default/file-thumbnail.tsx, registry/radix/button.tsx, registry/radix/tooltip.tsx, registry/default/lib/utils.ts, registry/default/lib/springs.ts, registry/default/lib/font-weight.ts, registry/default/lib/shape-context.tsx, registry/default/lib/icon-context.tsx, registry/default/lib/surface-context.tsx, registry/default/lib/surface-classes.ts
notices: Registry styling metadata provenance is documented in registry/sources/fluid-functionalism/NOTICE.md.

modifications.change: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files. Wrapped the composer in MotionConfig with the user's reduced-motion preference. Changed the attachment remove control from a physical right offset to the logical inline end.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied composer self-contained and preserve its controls in reduced-motion and RTL contexts.

modifications.change: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files. Resolved the PDF worker from the installed pdfjs-dist package instead of a remote CDN URL. Updated the PDF fallback comment to describe local worker loading instead of CDN failure.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied attachment preview self-contained without a remote runtime asset.

modifications.change: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files. Disabled scale, stroke, and spinner motion when the user requests reduced motion. Namespaced the two spinner animation names to avoid collisions in consumer stylesheets.
modifications.reason: Keep shared actions self-contained and prevent decorative motion when reduced motion is requested.

modifications.change: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied support closure without consumer-specific project aliases.
